So that's like what happens in emergent abilities and you'll notice that most things that are talking about emergent abilities are usually talking about some sort of chain of thought or some sort of reasoning reasoning accuracy.

Even if that's not the case, even if they're just predicting a single token, it can still happen because basically the probability of a single token can continue to go up smoothly, but you only get the token correct after the probability starts getting higher than all the others.

This is another really interesting paper on trying to create assessments automatic assessments of how good chains of thought are and what they do essentially is it's relatively simple they get human feedback on each step of the derivation so they just basically ask people is this step of the derivation good.
